common_types: Sliding window (product less than K, max sum subarray)
Binary search in rotated sorted array
sample_problems: Number of subarrays having product less than or equal to K
Find index of element in sorted rotated array
Find common elements in sorted arrays

topics.name: Aggregations
topics.examples: COUNT, SUM, AVG with GROUP BY

sample_questions: Find the second largest value in a table
Write a query to find duplicate records
Calculate running totals with window functions

sample_questions.q: What is the time complexity of searching in a balanced BST?
Which HTTP status code indicates resource not found?
What does ACID stand for in databases?

common_mistakes: Not reading constraints - Check input size to determine expected complexity
Missing edge cases - Empty array, single element, all same values
Inefficient SQL - Avoid SELECT * and unnecessary subqueries
Skipping MCQs - Quick points, don't leave blank

preparation_tips.dsa: LeetCode Easy-Medium, focus on arrays, hash maps, sliding window
preparation_tips.sql: HackerRank SQL section, focus on JOINs and aggregations
preparation_tips.theory: Review HTTP, REST, ACID, basic CS fundamentals

after_assessment.next_step: If passed, HR schedules technical interviews
after_assessment.timeline: 3-4 weeks total from assessment to offer
